content.question: What combination of structural tracking reform and non-structural quality measures (teacher allocation, funding equalization, curriculum unification) is necessary to replicate Finland/Poland-style equity gains in the Hungarian institutional context?
content.reduction_path: Model and pilot a coordinated reform package combining tracking delay with unified curricula, extended compulsory comprehensive years, and school-funding equalization; evaluate on socio-economic performance gaps, between-school variance, and labor-market outcomes with at least 5-year follow-up
